events.note: initial v2 heuristic — def_count=0 AND assert_count>=3 AND no raw 91 C3 disclaimer

repo_scan.scan_command: tool/own31_verify_tautology_ban_lint.hexa --file <path> per-file via shell wrapper (docker mem=4g cap; full-batch in-process scan OOM-killed)

bypasses_closed: A: fence variants (```py / ```python3 / case-insensitive)
B: trivial def decoy (pass / return None / ...)
C: inline def body (def f(): expr)
D: lambda-substantive YES marker (was FP in v2)
E: per-line non-numeric exempt (was full-block bypass)
F: substantive disclaimer requires negation keyword
G: bare disclaimer comment bypass
H: packed boolean chain assert (a==1 and b==2 and c==3)
I: file-wide def name accumulation (cross-block calls)
J: bare anchor on literal assert (anchor needs fn call)
K: substantive iteration (range / dataset / non-literal)
L: tab-indented def body
M: pytest.approx + sympy/numpy real verification
N: pytest.raises + variable binding cmp expression
O: nested decoy def + class operator overload
P: subprocess + io + csv + json real verification
Q: float literal list iteration FP fix
R: pandas + bisect + while-loop real verification
S: multi-line backslash-continued assert
T: regex / zlib / hashlib real verification
U: unittest / numpy.testing assertEqual method-call recognition
V: unused-lambda decoy bypass
W: dict-access + class hierarchy hardcode
X: namedtuple + sage-style sympy compute
Y: long arith chain hardcoded
Z: docstring-only claim + sigil-table tautology
ZA: bypass cocktail (decoy import + decoy def + bare anchor)
ZA9: single-line semicolon-packed assert (a=1; assert a+a==2)
runtime_bugs_fixed: R1: hexa reserved word `scope` parse failure (renamed to `sx`)
R2: scope-existence gate via _file_exists rejected directories
yes_markers_added: compute-lib import + call (broadened from assert-line-only to any non-comment non-import line)
anchored-assertion (anchor + fn call on assert line)

follow_ups: OWN31_LEGACY_ALLOWLIST sidecar: enumerate the 9 currently-flagged blocks (3 papers + 6 domains) and decide per-file disposition (fix vs add raw 91 C3 disclaimer vs allowlist freeze)
.own own#31 metadata update — currently uchg-locked; needs `chflags nouchg .own && update && chflags uchg .own` from user
tool/own_doc_lint.hexa dispatcher integration (post own_doc_lint.hexa land — already complete cycle 30)

docker hexa-runner mem cap raise (4g → 8g) OR per-file invocation hardening: 214/603 files OOM-killed during full-batch scan (chip-architecture/ + ai-* + life/* clusters); per-file shell wrapper succeeded on the same 389 files.
